title: Evaluating mNGS, PCR, GM, and LFD for Diagnosing Invasive Fungal Disease: A Retrospective Case-Control Study in Lung Transplant Recipients
author: Jianxing, He
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This dataset supports the findings of the study titled 'Evaluating mNGS, PCR, GM, and LFD for Diagnosing Invasive Fungal Disease: A Retrospective Case-Control Study in Lung Transplant Recipients'. The study evaluates the diagnostic performance of various assays for detecting invasive fungal disease in lung transplant recipients.
steps_raw: This dataset supports the findings of the study titled 'Evaluating mNGS, PCR, GM, and LFD for Diagnosing Invasive Fungal Disease: A Retrospective Case-Control Study in Lung Transplant Recipients'. The study evaluates the diagnostic performance of various assays for detecting invasive fungal disease in lung transplant recipients.
